title: Move a DB write out of on_exit to the test body
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/on_exit_db_write.ex` performs `AuditTrail.record_event(user.id, "test_exited")` inside `on_exit/2`, which runs in a different process than the test owner and triggers `DBConnection.OwnershipError`. Rewrite to `test/my_app/audit_trail_test.exs`: remove the on_exit DB write entirely — the sandbox rollback handles cleanup automatically. Keep the test body intact.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing that on_exit runs in another process AND that sandbox rollback replaces manual cleanup.
research_citation: "The issue is that `on_exit` is executed in a different process than the test one" — Elixir Forum, totorigolo
